meaning: n.[鐢熷寲]鏈ㄧ氦缁磋川閰电礌,绾ょ淮绱犻叾
examples: The cellulase application study has made a great progress recently in China.
The substrate specificity showed that the alkaline cellulase was an endo type cellulase.
The effect of cellulase, hemicellulase and pectinase on litchi fruit pulp liquefaction was studied.
